home.title:
Your Story
Our Photography
home.subtitle: We create cinematic memories that last a lifetime.

about.text1: Halilagić Weddings is a professional wedding photo and video team based in Bihać, Bosnia and Herzegovina, available for weddings across Europe. With over 30 years of experience and a team of multiple specialists, we have mastered the art of capturing the most beautiful moments of your day in a romantic and unique way — exactly as the heart remembers them.
about.text2: Every wedding carries its own unique story. Our task is not just to photograph, but to feel the atmosphere, capture unspoken emotions, and turn them into images and films that will bring you back to that day again and again. What we offer is not just a service — it is an experience. From the first consultation to the final delivery, we take care of every detail so that the memories of your most important day are perfect. Whether you're planning an intimate wedding or a grand celebration, our team is here to make it unforgettable.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Beyond photography and video — every detail of your day, perfected.

niski-dim.title: Low Fog
niski-dim.description: A magical low-lying cloud of fog rolls across the dance floor for your first dance, creating a fairytale atmosphere you'll never forget.
niski-dim.fullDescription: Our professional low fog machine produces a dense, ground-hugging cloud that stays close to the floor — perfect for your first dance or cake cutting. Unlike standard fog machines, low fog dissipates quickly and doesn't fill the room, keeping visibility clear while giving your photos and video an ethereal, cinematic quality. The effect lasts several minutes and can be repeated throughout the evening.
includes: Operator present for the full event
Fully captured in your photo & video package

vatromet.title: Fireworks
vatromet.description: Illuminate your celebration with a breathtaking fireworks display — a grand finale that lights up the night sky and every memory.
vatromet.fullDescription: We coordinate and execute stunning fireworks displays tailored to the scale of your event. Whether you're dreaming of an intimate sparkler send-off or a full aerial pyrotechnic show, we handle all logistics, permits, and safety requirements so you can simply enjoy the moment. Every burst is timed to your music and captured in its full glory by our photo and video team.
includes: Fully captured in your photo & video package

photobook.title: Photobook
photobook.description: A luxury printed photobook — a handcrafted keepsake of your most beautiful moments, designed to be passed down through generations.
photobook.fullDescription: Our photobooks are premium, lay-flat printed albums designed in collaboration with you. Each book is carefully curated from your wedding gallery, featuring the most meaningful images in an elegant, story-driven layout. Printed on archival-quality paper with a hardcover binding, these books are built to last a lifetime and beyond. Available in multiple sizes and finishes.

lazni-maticar.title: Fake Officiant
lazni-maticar.description: A professional actor performs a heartfelt, personalised ceremony — giving you complete creative freedom over your vows and celebration.
lazni-maticar.fullDescription: A fake officiant (lažni matičar) allows couples to have a fully personalised ceremony without the constraints of a legal registration on the day. A professional and experienced actor conducts a real, emotional ceremony — complete with custom vows, readings, and any rituals you wish — while your legal paperwork is handled separately at a time that suits you. This option is popular for destination weddings and couples who want full creative control over their ceremony script.
includes: Ceremony fully captured in your photo & video package
